Not all vendors deserve the same level of scrutiny. 🔐 Most companies still treat third-party risk like a checklist — same questionnaire, same review, same energy — whether it's a payroll processor or a stationery supplier. That's not risk management. That's nois &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
